svg.title: HyperWeave — Where Vectors Meet Vision
svg.desc: V11 Cobalt Sapphire Formidable. Mobile-fixed: all var() in gradient stops and SVG attributes replaced with hardcoded values + CSS class switching for light/dark. Graph-theoretic construction with deep sapphire light flow.

hw:reasoning.hw:intent: Fix mobile dark mode by eliminating all var() from gradient stops and SVG attributes
hw:reasoning.hw:approach: Hardcoded dark gradient defs as default. Duplicate light-mode defs. CSS classes control visibility. All fill/stroke on elements use CSS classes not var() attributes.
hw:reasoning.hw:tradeoffs: Duplicated gradient defs increase file size ~15%. Accepted for universal mobile rendering. No var() anywhere in defs or inline SVG attributes.
